body: qwen3.5-27b generated 221,567 chars of pure reasoning tokens (48,206 llm.delta events) with zero content output and zero tool calls over 1800s. The model wrote the same Python code block 128 identical times in its reasoning chain but never committed to an answer or called any tool. Root cause: thinking-budget misconfiguration. The benchmark config.yaml uses type=openai-compat with model=qwen3.5-27b but sets no thinking_budget/thinking_level, so LM Studio serves the model with no reasoning cap. The picompat auto-configure path (which would auto-set thinking_level=medium for qwen3 models via isThinkingModel()) only runs when translating Claude Desktop config, not for direct config.yaml runs. loop.go is healthy: it made exactly one LLM call (iteration 0 of max_iterations=20) and the timeout hit at the provider level (Harbor asyncio.CancelledError) while awaiting the first llm.response that never arrived. No loop defect found; no follow-on fix bead warranted.
summary: Model runaway reasoning, not a loop defect
